name: Sequence
description: AI-native quote-to-revenue platform automating quoting, billing, collections, and revenue recognition for B2B SaaS.

seo.title: Sequence — Subscription Billing
seo.meta_description: Sequence: AI-native quote-to-revenue platform automating quoting, billing, collections, and revenue recognition for B2B SaaS.

when_to_use: Quoting + billing + revenue recognition in one B2B SaaS platform
Automating collections and cash application for contract billing
AI-driven billing workflows synced to CRM and ERP systems

pros: AI-driven automation across quoting and collections
Unifies billing, invoicing, and revenue recognition
Good fit for hybrid B2B SaaS pricing models
Modern UX compared to legacy billing tools
cons: AI features occasionally need manual correction
Pricing skews toward mid-market and up
Deep customizations may hit platform limits
review.verdict: Ambitious AI-native quote-to-revenue contender; worth evaluating, but verify it handles your edge cases.
review.best_for: B2B SaaS wanting modern AI-assisted automation across the contract-to-cash lifecycle.
review.not_for: Enterprises demanding long reference lists or teams running simple flat-rate subscriptions.

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Custom/contact sales alone is not peak-lock evidence

lock_in.reason: Deep billing integration hard to migrate
